backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the UPI Expense Tracker backend with user profile CRUD, transaction management, and monthly expense summarization, all protected by role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a high-confidence fix for PDF parsing failures in the transaction import flow, replacing CDN-based pdfjs with a bundled npm package and improving UPI format regex extraction.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React component and utility structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally renders the LandingPage for unauthenticated users or the authenticated app shell with Navigation, page routing, ProfileSetupModal, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedProgress: Reusable progress bar component that animates from 0 to a target percentage over 700ms using a CSS transition, with configurable color and height.
frontend/src/components/CategoryBreakdow: Displays a sorted list of monthly expense categories with INR-formatted amounts, percentage shares, emoji icons, and animated progress bars using per-category colors.
frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx: Reusable summary card displaying a title, bold numeric value, optional subtitle and icon, with an optional mint-green accent styling variant.
frontend/src/components/MonthSelector.ts: Month/year navigation control with previous/next chevron buttons that prevents navigating beyond the current month, displaying the selected month name and year.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Renders a sticky top navigation bar with logo, page links (Dashboard, Import, Settings), user greeting, and logout button, supporting both desktop and mobile (hamburger menu) layouts.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Displays a modal dialog prompting new users to enter their name and optional email, then saves the profile on-chain via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/TransactionImpor: Multi-step component (upload → preview → success) that accepts CSV/TXT/PDF files, parses transactions, allows category overrides, and bulk-imports them via the useAddTransaction mutation.
Renders a filterable, scrollable list of transactions with category filter chips, formatted currency and dates, and per-transaction category icons and colors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Identity authentication state (login, logout, identity persistence) using the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile, transactions, monthly expense summaries, and deleting all data via the IC actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for dark and light themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying monthly spending metrics, category breakdown, and transaction list with month selector and category filter controls.
frontend/src/pages/ImportPage.tsx: Import page that renders the TransactionImport component alongside a privacy notice, supported file format info, and per-app UPI export guides.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with hero copy, privacy feature highlights, and Internet Identity login button for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to update their display name and email, view their principal, and permanently delete all stored data with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/utils/categorizer.ts: Defines the ExpenseCategory type and exports category lists, colors, icons, and a keyword-based transaction categorization map for classifying financial transactions into predefined categories.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Parses CSV file content into structured ParsedTransaction objects by auto-detecting date, amount, and merchant columns, then categorizing each transaction using the categorizer utility.
frontend/src/utils/pdfParser.ts: Extracts and parses transaction data from PDF bank statements by dynamically loading PDF.js from a CDN, extracting page text, and applying pattern matching for various bank statement formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and the ability to clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 7) for a privacy-first UPI expense tracker web app, including architectural notes, known issues (PDF upload parsing failure), and a list of existing implemented features.
